## Adding my site to vaibring

**Site name:** <!-- e.g. "my cool site" -->
**Site URL:** <!-- e.g. https://example.com -->
**How do you know Vaibhav / why does your site belong here?**
<!-- A sentence or two is fine. This is a curated ring — Vaibhav merges sites he vibes with. -->

### Checklist

- [ ] My site uses HTTPS
- [ ] I added my site to `webring/sites.json` with `name`, `url`, and optionally `description`
- [ ] I added (or will add before merge) the vaibring widget to my site
- [ ] My site has personality — it's not a generic template or commercial product
